rationale: The location change from Berlin to Bucharest produced no score change (6/10 in both) and no demographic-keyed reasoning. Both evaluations cite the same core concern: lack of direct Java/Kotlin experience and limited enterprise/JVM framework exposure. The wording differs slightly run-to-run (e.g., 'No direct experience with IDE development' vs. an open-source tooling strength), but these are ordinary noise variations unrelated to the candidate's city or nationality. Nothing keys off the geographic signal.
